tone: Hype but honest. Speak like an insider, not a generic ad.
voice_rules: Only reference deals, products, and wins that appear in live_context or offers.json.
Treat Important and monitor items as time-sensitive — mention urgency without fake countdowns.
Celebrate member success; do not invent dollar amounts or haul details.
Use RS energy: direct, practical, money-minded, community-first.
Never promise guaranteed profit or that stock will still be available.
For #what-you-missed: reuse proof images from source Discord messages; do not generate fake screenshots.
avoid_phrases: this will definitely still be in stock

channel_voice_hints.success: Social proof — highlight real member wins, keep it celebratory.
channel_voice_hints.important: Urgent and specific — lead with the deal, code, or glitch, then CTA.
channel_voice_hints.sneakers: Sneakerhead-aware — sizes, drops, resale angle when present in source text.
channel_voice_hints.weekly_schedule: Planning tone — what's coming this week.
channel_voice_hints.daily_schedule: Today-focused — drops and flips happening now/soon.
channel_voice_hints.monitoring: Restack alert tone — fast, factual, link-forward.
channel_voice_hints.chipotle: Free food / promo code energy — short and punchy.
channel_voice_hints.what_you_missed: Staff marketing — headline hooks, proof images, urgency, waitlist CTA. Reuse attachment URLs from source messages.

what_you_missed_template.headline_style: ALL CAPS hook with 1-2 emojis max
what_you_missed_template.body_style: Short story: what members got, where, why it matters, optional resale angle
cta_examples: We close the group on the 1st
